message:
🐛 Add skeleton loading state to all 23 arcade game cards (#779)

Games were not reporting their data state to CardWrapper, causing
missing skeleton loading animations and refresh icon on initial load.

Added useReportCardDataState({ hasData: true }) to all arcade game
cards so CardWrapper knows they are ready immediately.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
